# Pull Request

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Assets (must be original or CC0)

## Modes tested

<!-- Gameplay/networking changes must be tested in all three modes. -->

- [ ] Local (same device)
- [ ] Offline LAN (host + client)
- [ ] Local Server (authoritative host)
- [ ] N/A (docs/assets only)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code, comments, and docs are in English
- [ ] Comments explain *why*, not just *what*
- [ ] No copyrighted assets (original or CC0 only)
- [ ] Follows the `AGENTS.md` spec
- [ ] Web + Android + iOS exports still work (if applicable)
